meta.note: Hand-curated shows from regional venues/promoters no scraper covers yet (China venues, Live Nation FR, …). Each entry verified against the official ticketing page on the date in _checked. Add here whenever a gap is found; build merges automatically. Images from slow origin servers (no CDN, e.g. ndm.cz) are downloaded, compressed and self-hosted under assets/posters/ — GitHub Pages serves them fast.
